description: Engine opener `effect=` — boot-only init effect (§51.0.H Form 3, S148 Insight 33). The effect runs exactly ONCE at module-init as the implicit init->initial= edge: it loads @tasks (2 items) then writes @phase = .Editing (tasks present), a cross-variant write statically checked against .Loading.rule. No input — the boot/hydration shape. OQ1 NOTE: whole-tree dom omitted — the .Editing state-child body renders into an impl-private engine-mount <div>; the author-anchored #phase + #count interpolations are impl-neutral.
rationale: §51.0.H Form 3: opener effect= is the effect of the implicit init->initial= transition, firing once at construction. Here it loads @tasks and performs a cross-variant write (.Loading -> .Editing) that is in .Loading.rule, so the engine boots straight past .Loading into .Editing with @tasks populated.
